problem id: c536c44c
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) OR SHL(2)

examples:
  00111000 -> 11100011
  10011001 -> 11111101
  11111011 -> 11111111
  11001011 -> 10111100
  11011111 -> 11111101
  11001101 -> 11111100
  11111100 -> 11111111
  00100000 -> 10000010

query: 01010000
predicted answer: 01000101
